hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.h|*.m|*.mm|*.swift|*.c|*.cpp) result=$(python3 "$HOME/.claude/skills/ios-blocked-words-check/scripts/check_blocked_words.py" "$f" 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"iOS 禁止关键词检查失败，禁止 git commit。违规详情：\n$result\"}}"; fi ;; esac; }
hooks.statusMessage: iOS 禁止关键词检查中...
